structural_coherence: The line 'Credit Hours: 3' is duplicated under the 'Course Information' section.

Within the 'Reading Responses' section, '# A. An insightful question about the reading.' and '## B. A comment about how the reading relates...' are incorrectly formatted as H1 and H2 headings, respectively, instead of being list items or bolded text.
The sections 'Discussion Board', 'Exams', and 'Semester Project' are incorrectly formatted as H2 headings; they should be H3 headings as sub-sections of 'Grading Policy'.
The 'Course Schedule' is not formatted as a table; the content under 'Week', 'Lecture Topic', and 'Notes' is free-flowing text rather than structured columns.
The 'Re-grading Policy' section is duplicated at the end of the document under 'Additional Course Information'.

new_false_positives: # A. An insightful question about the reading.
## B. A comment about how the reading relates to other course concepts or to an example/anecdote from your own life experience.
proposals.reasoning: The lines starting with '# A.' and '## B.' within the 'Reading Responses' section are incorrectly formatted as headers. They should be treated as list items or bolded text within the body of the 'Reading Responses' section, not as distinct section headers.
